profile: I keep critical systems running while making them better — across mainframe and modern platforms. Before engineering, I led teams and businesses for 14 years, so I think in outcomes: what ships, what holds, and what the team actually needs. That mix of operational discipline and hands-on technical range is what I bring.

highlights: Own architecture and delivery decisions across transaction-critical systems where mainframe and modern services must work together.
Build internal developer tooling that replaced scattered Word docs and old binders with a searchable, structured documentation hub.
Drive risk analysis for core banking modules and lead incident investigations end-to-end.
Delivered backend and integration work across Linux environments and banking APIs — hands-on from day one.
Handled production incidents, runtime diagnostics and end-to-end troubleshooting across system boundaries.
14 years of leading teams, owning outcomes and building operational discipline — skills that now shape how I approach system design and delivery.
Consistently operated in environments where uptime, accountability and execution quality were non-negotiable.

projects.name: Documentation Hub for Mainframe Teams
projects.description: A web-based internal tool replacing scattered documents with a searchable, structured platform built for mainframe developers and managers alike.

projects.name: Core-to-Modern Integration
projects.description: Production integration connecting stable mainframe transaction paths to modern service layers — reliability preserved, capabilities extended.
